title: CIEE Financial Aid Deferral Form — Shanghai bill admin
html:
CIEE Financial Aid Deferral Form — Shanghai bill admin

Source: 2024-09-16 Google Doc — a scanned/OCR'd CIEE Financial Aid Deferral Request Form. The OCR is mojibake'd (renders as &,(( &2//(*( 678'\< $%52$') but the structure is clear: Section I (student fills name/email/program), Section II (Financial Aid Officer fills disbursement schedule), authorizes OSU aid release directly to CIEE for the fall 2024 Shanghai semester.

TL;DR

  • Document type — official CIEE template, not Yahir's prose. The "completed" in the filename is aspirational — the form is mostly blank shells with image embeds.
  • Operational role — this is the form that routes Ford funded / JCEF funded aid through OSU's financial.aid@oregonstate.edu (541-737-2241) and onward to CIEE's studybillingteam@ciee.org to cover the Shanghai program fees.
  • Key dates — Fall payment deadline October 15; spring March 15. Yahir's Shanghai term was fall 2024, so October 15, 2024 was the binding date.
  • Liability disclaimer — "I am ultimately responsible for ensuring that my CIEE program fees are paid in full (not my home school financial aid office)." Yahir signs personal liability for any aid-shortfall.
  • The bill it covers — the same CIEE bill referenced in May 2024 OSU finals todo list ("complete all of CIEE stuff", "review CIEE bill").

Pattern observed

Pure administrative artifact in the scholarship-pipeline that the CIEE entity page already catalogues — Ford → JCEF → OSU Financial Aid → CIEE → Shanghai. This form is a literal piece of that pipe. It belongs alongside the July 2024 mega notebook (operational pre-trip prep) and the Mei Dong visa coordination thread as the bureaucratic substrate that made the China chapter possible.

Worth noting: the form was synced/captured mid-Shanghai-semester (September 16, 2024 — Yahir was already in Shanghai), suggesting it was either signed in advance and dated for the in-program window, or a follow-up disbursement adjustment.

Privacy

The form is a blank template — no PII filled in. Yahir's name appears only in the filename, not in the body content. No redactions needed.
